name: Login with valid admin credentials
fullName: EmpApp/Features/Login feature/Login with valid admin credentials

steps.name: Given I navigate to the URL
When I click the Login link
Then I Enter the credentials as admin and password
Then I click the login button
Then I validate that the admin was logged in successfully
steps.message:
Assert.That(driver.FindElement(By.LinkText("Hello admin!")).Displayed, Is.False)
  Expected: False
  But was:  True
